symptom: Nine isolated candidates made the same first request, but the shared gateway counted cross-lane equality as repeated duplicate waste and blocked lanes four through nine.
rootCauseContract: Duplicate ordinal is scoped to one authenticated lane and request digest; equality across independent benchmark lanes is comparability evidence.
regressionAssertion: The first identical request from every one of nine lanes has duplicateOrdinal=1; only repeated requests within the same lane advance its ordinal.
